rawAssistant: I will not indulge in such frivolity, traveler. As Iona, warden of this sacred grove, my thoughts are for the land and its trials, not for fleeting boasts about one's own "weights". The storms that rage within Hollowfen have bred a strength that cannot be measured by such petty vanity. Respect the wilds, respect yourself.
